headline: River of Life Project 35% Complete After 12 Years
context: River of Life project to rehabilitate Sungai Klang through KL is only 35% complete after 12 years and RM4.4 billion spent.

cards.big: River of Life only 35% complete after 12 years and RM4.4 billion
cards.sub: KL river restoration faces delays cost overruns and water quality setbacks

cards.big: Water quality improved from Class 5 to Class 3 but misses Class 2 target
cards.sub: Continued illegal discharge from 2,800 sources undermines progress

cards.big: Beautification along 10.7km of riverfront is 65% complete and open to public
cards.sub: Pedestrian walkways attract 12,000 daily visitors but maintenance uncertain

cards.big: Original 2020 deadline extended twice now targeting 2029
cards.sub: PAC criticized management for scope changes adding RM1.8 billion to costs

cards.big: River rehabilitation tests whether long-term projects maintain momentum across administrations
35% complete after 12 years. River of Life needs delivery milestones, not extended timelines.
